title: Ubiquiti UACC-PoE+-USBC, PoE Integrated AC Adapter
description: An AC adapter with integrated PoE, enabling the UniFi Cloud Gateway device to support PoE output on a single port. Adapter is equiped with USB-C 5V/5A output and integrated PoE 48V/0.65A . PoE power is supplied on all pins: 1, 2, 4, 5 (+) and 3, 6, 7, 8 (-). The adapter supports LAN speeds of up to 10Gb . The USB-C/Ethernet cable is 150 cm long, while the power cable is 180 cm long. With this adapter, you can connect your home router with USB-C power and an antenna or LTE for internet access… Compatible with: UCG-Ultra UCG-Max UXG-Lite UXG-Max UX
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Ethernet speed [Mb/s] 10/100/1000/2500/5000/10000 Gigabit LAN Yes Power The input voltage [V] 230V AC Pin powering 1,2,4,5 (+), 3,6,7,8 (-) PoE Out ports 1 Output Voltage [V] 48 Output Current [A] 0,65
